questionHtml: The organic product is not optically active. Discuss whether or not the organic product is a racemic mixture.
markschemeHtml:
no AND there is no chiral carbon

OR

no AND there is no carbon with four different substituents/groups [✔]

 

Note: Accept “no AND no asymmetric carbon
atom”.

meta.title: The organic product is not optically active. Discuss whether or not the organic product is a racemic mixture.
